answers.answer: Follow npm semantics exactly: 1.0 - 2.0 → >=1.0.0 <2.1.0 (partial right-hand = exclusive next). 1.0.0 - 2.0.0 → >=1.0.0 <=2.0.0 (full right-hand = inclusive).
Pin concrete version in lockfile, same as normal alias. Re-resolve only when lockfile is absent or --no-lockfile.
Yes, handle scoped packages too. If spec doesn't parse as semver and looks like a package name (starts with @ or lowercase alpha), treat as bare alias.
Close #883 after tech-platform Nx monorepo install succeeds. No other remaining work — all original bugs were addressed.
Commit a trimmed fixture to tests/fixtures/. Manual reproduction is not reliable for CI.
